name: Jalapeno Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds russet potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stockpot, sauté onion in butter or margarine until just tender.
2. Add potatoes, chicken broth, and cumin. Cover and cook until potatoes are tender (about 20-30 minutes).
3. Remove from heat and stir in jalapenos, baking soda (if using), and evaporated milk. Mash the potatoes with a potato masher to desired consistency.
4. Stir well and season with salt and pepper. Return to low heat and simmer for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Serve individual portions garnished with a dollop of sour cream and sprinkled with chopped green onions.
This recipe is one of the owner's newest creations and has quickly become a favorite among customers. It was featured in Gourmet Magazine. Serves 16 to 18.
